title: ConstructionSiteSafetyRuleset
description: Production safety ruleset for construction site PPE and hazard compliance monitoring. Each rule defines a detectable violation condition, its severity, and the zones where it applies.

standard_references: OSHA 29 CFR 1926 — Safety and Health Regulations for Construction
EN 361 / ANSI Z359.1 — Full Body Harness Standards

zone_definitions.ACTIVE_ZONE: Areas with active construction work (excavation, framing, concrete pour)
zone_definitions.HEIGHT_ZONE: Any work surface or scaffold ≥ 2 meters above ground level
zone_definitions.MACHINERY_ZONE: Areas within 5-meter radius of operating heavy machinery (cranes, excavators, forklifts)

CRITICAL.description: Imminent danger of fatal injury. Requires immediate work stoppage and intervention.

HIGH.description: Significant injury risk. Worker must be alerted and corrective action taken before work continues.

MEDIUM.description: Moderate risk. Worker should be notified and compliance restored at next safe stopping point.

LOW.description: Minor compliance issue. Log for review and address during next safety briefing.

rules.description: Every worker on an active construction site must wear a properly fitted safety helmet (hard hat) at all times. The helmet must be visible on the worker's head; carrying it or wearing it backwards does not constitute compliance.
rules.suggested_action: Immediately provide the worker with a safety helmet. Do not allow work to continue without head protection.

rules.description: Workers in active construction zones must wear high-visibility (hi-vis) vests or jackets meeting Class 2 or Class 3 visibility standards. The vest must be fully worn and fastened.
rules.suggested_action: Provide the worker with a high-visibility vest and ensure it is properly fastened before resuming work.

rules.description: Workers operating at heights ≥ 2 meters above ground level (scaffolds, rooftops, elevated platforms) must wear a full-body safety harness connected to a secure anchor point. Visual cues for height include scaffolding, ladders, elevated platforms, and roof edges.
rules.suggested_action: Immediately halt elevated work. Worker must don a full-body harness and secure the lanyard to an approved anchor point before continuing.

rules.description: A detected hard hat must be properly seated on the worker's head. Helmets carried in hand, hung on belts, worn backwards (unless manufacturer-approved), or placed on surfaces near the worker constitute improper usage.
rules.suggested_action: Instruct the worker to properly place and secure the hard hat on their head before continuing any site activity.

rules.description: A high-visibility vest must be fully worn with closures fastened. A vest that is unzipped, unbuttoned, draped over shoulders without arm insertion, or tied around the waist does not meet compliance.
rules.suggested_action: Ask the worker to fully fasten/zip the high-visibility vest to ensure 360° visibility.

rules.description: Workers within a 5-meter radius of operating heavy machinery (cranes, excavators, forklifts, loaders) must have COMPLETE PPE: hard hat + hi-vis vest at minimum. Missing any single item in the machinery zone is a critical violation.

conditions.note: Euclidean distance between bbox centers < 25% of frame diagonal

rules.suggested_action: Immediately move the worker to a safe distance from the machinery. Enforce full PPE (hard hat + hi-vis vest) before allowing re-entry into the machinery zone.

rules.description: Workers exhibiting posture patterns consistent with fall risk: leaning beyond 45° from vertical, crouching near unguarded edges, climbing without three-point contact, or lying on elevated surfaces. This rule is supplementary and typically requires pose estimation data.

conditions.note: Horizontal orientation suggests fallen or dangerously leaning worker

rules.suggested_action: Dispatch safety personnel to assess the worker's condition immediately. If at height, initiate fall rescue protocol.

rules.rule_name: Complete PPE Ensemble in Active Zone
rules.description: Workers in designated active construction zones must wear the complete required PPE ensemble: hard hat AND hi-vis vest simultaneously. Partial compliance is still a violation.
rules.suggested_action: Ensure the worker is equipped with both hard hat and hi-vis vest before allowing entry into the active construction zone.

rules.description: Non-PPE-equipped individuals (visitors, passersby, unauthorized personnel) detected within marked danger zones. Any person without minimum PPE (hard hat) inside a danger zone boundary is a violation.
rules.suggested_action: Immediately escort the individual out of the danger zone. Verify authorization and provide required PPE before allowing re-entry.

rules.description: Scene-level rule: when ambient lighting is insufficient (mean frame brightness < 60/255), all detected workers MUST have hi-vis vests. This rule upgrades vest violations from HIGH to CRITICAL severity in low-light conditions.
rules.suggested_action: In low-visibility conditions, hi-vis vests are MANDATORY for all personnel. Halt work until all workers have proper high-visibility apparel.
